_README: VERIFY each value against the image before trusting it. Pre-filled to save typing, NOT to be trusted blindly. Fix anything wrong. Delete 'uncertain' once you've checked a field. Scalars: plain value. Molecules: canonical SMILES (RDKit-compared). Tables: list of row objects.
_plain_text_note: LEVEL 1 target: the whole page transcribed verbatim, line by line, as written (including struck-out text marked [struck:...]). Everything below this is the Level 3/4 PARSED breakdown of the same content. Verify each line against the image.
plain_text: Goal: Screen electrolyte 240604-B for stable Li plating at 30 °C
Electrolyte: 1M LiTFSI in [struck: diglyme] diglyme : EtOH (4:1 v/v), 20 mL tot
Working elec. : glassy C RDE (0.3 cm²) ; CE: Li foil ; ref: Ag/AgCl
Apply -0.45V vs Ag/AgCl, 90 min, w = 1600 rpm
n = Q/zF = 0.81 C / 96485 C/mol = 8.4 E-6 mol · 6.94 g Li/mol Li = 5.8E-5 g
Electrode Temperature test : hot plate at 30 °C
goal: Screen electrolyte 240604-B for stable Li plating at 30 C
electrolyte.additive.name: 12-crown-4
procedure.steps: Add 5 mol% 12-crown-4 as additive. Stir 20 min
calculations.n_chain.expression: n = Q/zF = 0.81 C / 96485 C/mol = 8.4 E-6 mol · 6.94 g Li/mol Li = 5.8E-5 g
_calc_note: VERIFY against page char-by-char. The moles+mass step is ONE chained line (n_chain). Denominator is zF (z=1, per the '1 e- = 1 Li+' annotation under the arrow), NOT 2F. value fields re-derived & trustworthy; expression as-WRITTEN.
_smiles_note: Only molecules DRAWN on the page go here: 12-crown-4 / [Li(12-crown-4)]+, LiTFSI, and the small zig-zag labelled diglyme. Record each AS DRAWN. The diglyme sketch ends in -OH (COCCOCCO), which differs from true diglyme (COCCOCCOC) — keep what is drawn; the WORD 'diglyme' is captured separately in electrolyte.solvent. Verify the OH terminus on the full-res page.
results.temperature_test.label: Electrode temperature test: hot plate at 30 °C
